attributes.action: Stop the Syrian invasion of Rojava and the massacres committed by them.
attributes.additional_details: The Kurds  (SDF)  helped the international coalition in defeating isis and captured most of the territory from them and successfully captured Raqqa their capital from them effectively ending the Islamic State, the group is a major NATO and coalition  partner.  SDF have demonstrated to the world their democratic and fair values in the creation in the North Eastern Autonomous Region  of Syria where they have created a fair and free society between the many minorities there
attributes.background: Ban of arm sales to the Syrian transitional government and imposing sanctions towards them until the Unjust invasion of the Rojava area is stopped.

rejection.details:
The following petitions call for similar actions: 

Condemn attacks on Kurds in North Syria & use diplomatic pressure to bring peace
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756339

Put diplomatic pressure on Syria & Turkey to protect Kurds & other minorities
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757124

UK must act now & condemn the killing of Kurdish civilians in Rojava & Rojhilat 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756419
